name: io.github.klodr/faxdrop-mcp
description: Send real faxes from any MCP-enabled AI assistant. Wraps the FaxDrop API (PDF/DOCX/JPG/PNG, international numbers, status polling) with rate limits, dry-run mode, and audit logging.

environmentVariables.name: FAXDROP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: FaxDrop API key. Get one at https://faxdrop.com/account (Developer API → Generate Key).
